ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party involved in the transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account involved in the transaction */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "is_income" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction is an income or expense */,
  "transaction_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "starting_balance" TEXT /* Starting balance of the account before the transaction */,
  "final_balance" TEXT /* Final balance of the account after the transaction */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or identifier for the transaction */,
  "external_transaction_id" TEXT /* External transaction ID if linked to an external system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_party_id") REFERENCES transaction_parties ("transaction_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_parties" (
  "transaction_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the party */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the party */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_parties_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "audit_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the audit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the audit entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_audit_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_audit_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, accountant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_scheduled" (
  "scheduled_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being scheduled */,
  "schedule_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction is scheduled for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scheduled transaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the scheduled transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheduled_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_scheduled_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_scheduled_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_deleted" (
  "deleted_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deleted transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being deleted */,
  "delete_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was deleted */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transaction deletion */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the transaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the deleted transaction entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deleted_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_deleted_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_deleted_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., transaction, audit) */,
  "report_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
